title: stelis calotricha
intro: Stelis calotricha, also known as the 'Orchidaceae family' member, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis calotricha include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Stelis calotricha include tea infusions and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
